summary: Dad Joke of the Day component migration is complete and correct — category pills migrated to Badge, empty state to EmptyState, all 294 tests pass

findings.description: Badge renders as <div> with role='button' instead of native <button>. Functionally correct with keyboard handlers, but native <button> is generally preferred for interactive elements. Acceptable given the design intent to use @repo/ui Badge styling.
No dedicated test file for joke-viewer.tsx component changes (category pill migration). Existing layout test covers auth gating but not the Badge-based category filter interaction.
Three separate imports from @repo/ui on consecutive lines could be consolidated into a single import statement for cleanliness.
